title.en: If this continues, he will most likely lose!

content.en:
Bang!!!

Emperor Fengyang angrily burst out with all his strength and fought with Ye Xingchen.

However, both of them are the ultimate of the Invincible True Ancestor, and they can be called invincible in terms of strength, speed, and defense.

But Ye Xingchen has a small level of forbidden body, and the invincible True Ancestor can't kill him, and it's even difficult to hurt him, this is his advantage.

After fighting for half an hour, Emperor Fengyang's strength was consumed, and he knew very well that he couldn't hurt Ye Xingchen at all, but Ye Xingchen's attack could attack him.

Now, he has suffered a lot of injuries, and the speed of recovery from his injuries is simply not as fast as the speed at which he was injured.

If this continues, he will most likely lose!

"No, I can't be defeated, just a weak Terran, not even a powerful Dao Ancestor, if I am defeated in the hands of such a Terran genius, I will definitely be punished by the Heavenly Emperor Palace when I go back!"

He knew very well that his every move was always in the sight of some Dao Ancestors, and they were also watching this battle.

They may be afraid that the Heavenly Emperor Palace will not dare to make a move against him, but once he is defeated, those guys will probably spread the word everywhere, and then the entire Xuanxu Ancient Realm will know that he has been defeated by Ye Xingchen.

Once that time comes, his face will be lost, how can he mix it up?

Bang!

After the Fengyang Emperor and Ye Xingchen collided and separated with one blow, the Fengyang Emperor took out one of his forbidden weapons, the Wind Thunder Sword!

As one of the emperors, the biggest advantage is that you can get a forbidden weapon forged by the Heavenly Emperor Palace, which is also one of the treatments of the emperors of the Heavenly Emperor Palace.

From this, it can be seen how strong the foundation of the Heavenly Emperor Palace is, and a mere invincible true ancestor has rewarded forbidden weapons, while the six or seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors of other forces do not have forbidden weapons, and even some supreme Dao Ancestors do not have forbidden weapons.

Of course.

Now, with the proliferation of forbidden and strange things, many supreme Dao ancestors have also created their own forbidden weapons.

But even so, the forbidden weapon was enough to make countless Dao Ancestors envious.

"Forbidden weapons!"

Voices sounded in the void, and they were the Dao Ancestors who were onlookers.

When they saw the forbidden weapon of Emperor Fengyang, they were envious one by one, and even had the idea of snatching it.

But when they thought that Emperor Fengyang was from the Heavenly Emperor Palace, they calmed down one by one.

The Heavenly Emperor Palace is the most powerful force in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm now, and any one of the strongest Dao Ancestors can easily kill them, and they don't want to die yet.

I saw that Emperor Fengyang was holding the Wind Thunder Sword and slashed out countless sword lights, and one after another sword lights bombarded Ye Xingchen's Xingchen Dao Clothes, although they were still defended, but they made Xingchen Dao Clothes tremble.

Abrupt.

Emperor Fengyang quickly approached Ye Xingchen and came in close combat.

Burst!

The Wind Thunder Sword pierced Xingchen's Dao robe with powerful taboo rules, and stabbed Ye Xingchen's forbidden body, leaving a wound on Ye Xingchen's body.

"Hahaha, Ye Xingchen, no matter how powerful your defense is, you can't block the forbidden weapon, you are not my opponent!"

Emperor Fengyang said arrogantly.

He felt that Ye Xingchen's biggest advantage was his high defense and forbidden body, but the forbidden body could also be injured by forbidden weapons, plus the wind and thunder sword broke the defense, which contained the taboo-tearing rule.

So, he felt like he had a chance to win!

"Emperor Fengyang, do you think that only you have a forbidden weapon?"

Ye Xingchen sneered.

"Oh, could it be that you also have a forbidden weapon?" the Emperor of Fengyang frowned.

At this moment, Ye Xingchen's right hand shook the void, and the Xingchen blade appeared in his hand.

"Forbidden weapons!"

Emperor Fengyang's pupils shrank, and he was immediately shocked, he didn't expect that Ye Xingchen also had a forbidden weapon in his hand.

Creating a forbidden weapon is not a matter of many taboo strange things, there must be embryos that can be used to create forbidden weapons, and some weapon-type taboo strange objects can naturally act as embryos, but weapon-type taboo weapons are too rare, and general low-level, medium-, or even high-level taboo strange objects are not eligible as embryos, and at the very least, they must be the top taboo strange objects of the weapon class to be eligible.

But it's more difficult to get a top-level forbidden weapon, let alone a weapon-type forbidden artifact.

Therefore, at present, the number of forbidden weapons in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is very small.

"Damn, how can he have everything?"

Emperor Fengyang said angrily.

Compared with Ye Xingchen, he, the emperor of the Heavenly Emperor Palace, seemed to be very ordinary and had no particularities.

"Hmph, even if it's a forbidden weapon, it's strong and weak!"

Emperor Fengyang continued to fight with Ye Xingchen with the Wind Thunder Sword in his hand.

Dangdangdang!!

In the void, the two forbidden weapons kept colliding, and at the same time, the Dao skills of the two also collided occasionally.

The human race, many True Ancestors and Dao Ancestors are also observing.

A one-heavy Heavenly Dao Ancestor sighed: "It's so strong, if I fight with them, I will have to be killed in a few moves!"

A Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor also smiled bitterly and said, "I'm a Dual Heavenly Dao Ancestor, but I can't beat them!"

Qin Heavenly Dao Ancestor also deeply sighed at the strength of Ye Xingchen and Emperor Fengyang, although he was about to be promoted to Triple Heavenly Dao Ancestor, he knew very well that he was not sure that he would be able to defeat these two Invincible True Ancestors, but he would also be defeated if he was not careful.

Time passed little by little, and Ye Xingchen and Emperor Fengyang had been at war for a long time.

Abrupt.

There was a click, and a crisp sound echoed through the void.

At this moment, countless people's faces changed drastically.

It's the sound of a forbidden weapon being cut off!

Due to the large fluctuations in the battle between the two, and the fire that erupted at the moment of collision illuminated the void, it was difficult to see the situation inside.

"Whose forbidden weapon is broken?" said a Dao Ancestor.

Soon, a figure was knocked out, and it was the somewhat embarrassed Emperor Fengyang.

At this moment, Emperor Fengyang was holding a broken Wind Thunder Sword in his hand, and his face was iron-blue.

"Ye Xingchen, you actually cut off my Wind Thunder Sword!!!"

Emperor Fengyang roared.

This is a forbidden weapon, a forbidden weapon given to him by the Heavenly Emperor Palace, and it does not completely belong to him for the time being, in case he is deprived of the identity of the emperor, this forbidden weapon still needs to be returned, only when he steps into the ranks of Dao Ancestors, can he really have this forbidden weapon.

But now, the Wind and Thunder Sword is broken, and after the Heavenly Emperor Palace knows about it, it will inevitably punish him heavily, and even strip him of his identity as the emperor!

Although the Wind Thunder Sword was cut by Ye Xingchen, if he didn't fight Ye Xingchen, would the Wind Thunder Sword be broken?

Therefore, the Heavenly Emperor Palace will inevitably put the fault on him.

To put it simply, he's finished!
